creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Thu Aug 22 20:58:30 2013
New Revision: 325233
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/325233

Log:
  www/fusionpbx: update to 3.3
  
  - Update to 3.3 [1]
  - Add LICENSE (MPL)
  
  PR:		ports/181469 [1]
  Submitted by:	Chris Petrik <c.petrik.sosa@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/www/fusionpbx/Makefile
  head/www/fusionpbx/distinfo
  head/www/fusionpbx/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/fusionpbx/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/fusionpbx/Makefile	Thu Aug 22 20:44:37 2013	(r325232)
+++ head/www/fusionpbx/Makefile	Thu Aug 22 20:58:30 2013	(r325233)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	fusionpbx
-DISTVERSION=	3.2
+DISTVERSION=	3.3
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.fusionpbx.com/downloads/ \
 		${MASTER_SITE_GOOGLE_CODE}
@@ -10,6 +10,8 @@ MASTER_SITES=	http://www.fusionpbx.com/d
 MAINTAINER=	c.petrik.sosa@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	PHP5 Graphical User Interface for FreeSwitch
 
+LICENSE=	MPL
+
 LIB_DEPENDS=	odbc:${PORTSDIR}/databases/unixODBC
 RUN_DEPENDS+=	${PHPBASE}/lib/php/${PHP_EXT_DIR}/pdo_odbc.so:${PORTSDIR}/databases/php${PHP_VER}-pdo_odbc
 

Modified: head/www/fusionpbx/distinfo
==============================================================================
